scope_note: QA Witt Tower A-Coordinate Weekly Direction Certificate [459]. Tests whether the QA A2-derived coordinate a=b+2e predicts next-week price direction across 5 US equity indices. Primary source: Fama EF (1970) Efficient capital markets doi:10.2307/2325486 (random-walk baseline). Secondary: Lo AW & MacKinlay AC (1988) doi:10.1093/rfs/1.1.41 (short-horizon return predictability). MAPPING: weekly log-return -> rank in N-return window -> bin=floor(rank*27/N) in Z/27Z; consecutive pairs (b=bins[t-1], e=bins[t]) -> A2 derived coord a=b+2*e (raw, not mod-reduced). PREDICTION GROUP: a<=6 (low A-coordinate). PRIMARY RESULT: Pooled 5 indices n=213, mean=+0.99% vs base=+0.17%, pos=60.1%, perm_p=0.0000. REGIME STRUCTURE: OOS post-2015 GSPC n=19, mean=+2.52%, perm_p=0.0000; IS pre-2015 GSPC n=26, mean=-0.05%, perm_p=0.7968 (regime-concentrated signal). PER-INDEX: GSPC(p=0.016), DJI(p=0.012), SPY(p=0.005) significant; IXIC(p=0.338), QQQ(p=0.120) null. CERTIFIED: (C1) pooled perm_p<0.01 PASS. (C2) mean=+0.99%>=0.5% PASS. (C3) pos=60.1%>57% PASS. (C4) 3/5 sig PASS. (C5) OOS perm_p<0.05 PASS. (C6) IS NULL (perm_p=0.797>0.30) PASS [regime-concentration is the claim]. Structural parents: cert [110] (Witt Tower), cert [457] (monthly vol), cert [458] (weekly S-orbit direction). Validated 2026-06-18.
